rules: Three-point line is a restricted zone (except for goalkeepers).
Players may land inside the zone on a throw as long as the ball is released before landing.
Dribbling is allowed, but once you stop your dribble, you cannot start again.
Maximum of 3 steps allowed with the ball.
3-second limit to pass or shoot (applies to goalies too).

key_terms.definition: The area inside the 3-point line where only the goalie is allowed to stand.
3 steps, 3 seconds, 3 meters (distance for defenders on restarts).
A shot taken while jumping into the air, often used to get a better angle over the defense.

discussion.question: What is the Spirit of the Game?

global_connections.description: Handball is a massive professional sport in Europe, especially in Germany, Denmark, and France.

unit_plan.games: Keep away / Lead-up passing games, scrimmage
